entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Eleusine coracana (L.) Gaertn) for which microsatellite markers are being developed.

entities.description: An improved procedure used to efficiently develop microsatellite markers.

entities.description: Molecular markers used to investigate the genetic structuring of natural populations.

entities.name: MOLECULAR GENETICS
entities.description: The field of study involving the molecular basis of heredity and variation.

entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within and among populations.

entities.name: NATURAL POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups of organisms of the same species living in a natural environment.
